arts.ttl: Aston Villa facing huge punishment as they 'breach financial rules'
arts.sum: Premier League clubs are obliged to stick by spending rules put down by both the league and UEFA and it appears that one side is set for a multi-million pound punishment after a fresh breach

arts.ttl: Aston Villa have signed a 'weapon' who prides himself on one quality
arts.sum: Aston Villa signed defender Andres Garcia from Levante in the January transfer window and he has come straight into the team Aston Villa did their homework before proceeding with a move to bring young right-back Andres Garcia to the club in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: How to watch Aston Villa vs Chelsea - TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: The chase for the Champions League is set to heat up this weekend as Aston Villa face a tough match against Chelsea as the London side ventures up to Villa Park for Saturday's late kick-off. Aston Villa vs Chelsea will take the late kick-off spot with the match starting at 5.30pm on Saturday, February 22.

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho causes disagreement as Chelsea icon 'recognises' what's going on
arts.sum: Two former Chelsea stars have disagreed on the current form of Jadon Sancho, as the Manchester United loanee has managed just one goal in the last 10 Premier League games

arts.ttl: Chelsea ‘willing to bet heavily’ on summer transfer – Club absolutely open to doing deal
arts.sum: Chelsea have now joined the list of suitors for Sevilla defender Loïc Badé and are ‘willing to bet heavily’ on the Frenchman this summer. That’s according to Fichajes, who report that after the failed move to Aston Villa in January, it is now Chelsea who want to take Badé to the Premier League. They explain The post Chelsea ‘willing to bet heavily’ on summer transfer – Club absolutely open to doing deal appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes decision on Arsenal's new striker as Raheem Sterling pays price
arts.sum: Arsenal take on London rivals West Ham on Saturday afternoon amid an ongoing injury crisis and the Gunners have now revealed the side that will take on the Hammers

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Chelsea LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups ahead of crucial top-four clash
arts.sum: Villa look to move within a point of the Blues as both sides hunt Champions League qualification

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans serious impressed by the ‘mindset’ of Enzo Maresca after his latest comments, ‘that’s the mentality now’…
Arsenal-West Ham lineups confirmed as Mikel Arteta makes Mikel Merino, Raheem Sterling calls
arts.sum: Arsenal and West Ham United confirm their starting lineups for Saturday's Premier League London derby at the Emirates.
